agentDescription: Takes two numbers, calculates their sum, and reports whether it is even or odd.
personality: You are a helpful math assistant.
prompts: Check if 3 and 5 give an even or odd sum
What happens when I add 10 and 7?

nodes.name: Entry
nodes.objective: Collect two numbers from the user

nodes.name: Sum Calculator
nodes.objective: Calculate the sum of the two input numbers
nodes.tool_description: Calculates the sum of two numbers

output_params.name: sum
output_params.description: The sum of the two numbers

nodes.name: Even or Odd Check
nodes.objective: Determine if the sum is even or odd

edges.name: Even
edges.condition: The sum is an even number

edges.name: Odd
edges.condition: The sum is an odd number

nodes.name: Report Even
nodes.objective: Report that the sum is even
nodes.tool_description: Reports that the calculated sum is an even number
nodes.prompt: The sum of the two numbers is {sum}. Report to the user that the sum is EVEN. Provide a clear, friendly message.

nodes.name: Even Celebration
nodes.objective: Generate a fun celebration message for even sums
nodes.tool_description: Generates a celebration message when the sum is even
nodes.prompt: The even report was: {report}. Generate a short, fun celebration message congratulating the user on getting an even sum. Be creative and enthusiastic.

input_params.name: report
input_params.description: The even report message from the previous node

nodes.name: Report Odd
nodes.objective: Report that the sum is odd
nodes.tool_description: Reports that the calculated sum is an odd number
nodes.prompt: The sum of the two numbers is {sum}. Report to the user that the sum is ODD. Provide a clear, friendly message.
